description: The animation seems to only happen the first time i cross the suit. If I cross the suit while ALREADY having that suit, its correct that the animation should not happen. However, if i colelct the suit, then undo my move, then recross the suit, the animation should happen every time the run over it when i previously didnt have the suit, even if it was undone.
summary: Suit "pop out" animation does not occur multiple times in one turn
